description: The casual slip-on shoe is back with a bang from skechers. Crafted from a smooth leather upper with stylishly dyed overlays, this shoe makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Upper Leather upper with overlaysSlip-on style for ease of wearElastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offers a customised FitErgonomically padded footbed for all-day comfortStitch and reivet details on the upper for styleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsole TPR outsole with a transparent fabric forefoot that has strategically placed lugs, and lugs on the heel for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
